vocab.database: Use Prisma ORM with MySQL datasource provider. Alternatively, use Drizzle ORM for a lighter type-safe option. Use connection pooling — in serverless environments, use PlanetScale (MySQL-compatible) which handles pooling automatically.
vocab.search: Use MySQL FULLTEXT indexes on text columns with MATCH() AGAINST() syntax. For production full-text needs, prefer Algolia or Elasticsearch as MySQL's full-text search has limited relevance tuning.
vocab.migrations: Use Prisma Migrate for schema evolution. Each migration generates a SQL file. In production, use `prisma migrate deploy` (not dev). Never drop columns without a multi-step migration if data must be preserved.
vocab.performance: Add indexes with INDEX or UNIQUE INDEX on frequently filtered/sorted columns. Use EXPLAIN to analyze query execution plans. Use query caching at the application layer (Redis) for expensive read queries.
vocab.json: MySQL 8 supports native JSON columns. Query with JSON_EXTRACT() or the -> operator shorthand. Index specific JSON paths with generated columns + index for performance.
